# Dock choreography transitions: the non-FLIP motion classes consume the #14779 contract substrate

## Context

Successor leaf from the #14779↔#14929 signed motion-contract disposition (ratified 2026-07-10, #14779 comment thread): #14779 delivered the CONTRACT SUBSTRATE (PR #14947 — the `--dock-transition-*` token set, token-layer reduced-motion collapse, and the `dock-animating` signal owner `Neo.dashboard.DockMotionSignal`). This leaf is the substrate's first Body-side CONSUMER: the non-FLIP choreography — the CSS class-toggle transitions for property motion the disposition left to "follow-up ranges". The FLIP commit layer (#14929) is the SIBLING consumer for structural re-layout jumps; both read the same tokens and route the same signal, so there is ONE observable motion lifecycle.

## The Fix

One PR, adapter + theme tier only (presentation-only per the JSON-first guardrail):

1. **Splitter size ease** — committed `resizeSplit` re-projections transition flex-basis/size via a `neo-dashboard-dock-motion` transition class reading the tokens.
2. **Tab insert/remove morphing** — entering/leaving tab headers transition in/out instead of teleporting.
3. **Auto-hide rail slide** — the §2.7 reveal overlay + rail affordances slide on the tokens (the reveal FSM stays timing-owner; this is projection skin).
4. **Arrival settle highlight** — a brief settle affordance on cross-window arrival (§2.3 landed mechanics).

Every motion: duration/easing from `--dock-transition-*` ONLY (no call-site literals — review-checkable), `DockMotionSignal.enter/leave` around the transition lifecycle (`transitionend` + the signal's own fail-safe), `prefers-reduced-motion` honored by construction (token collapse — zero per-site checks).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All four motion classes transition with durations sourced ONLY from the token set (review-checkable: no literals at call sites).
- [ ] Every motion routes `DockMotionSignal` — `observe_motion` e2e can assert start/settle on `neo-dashboard-dock-animating` for each class (#14591-successor wires those specs).
- [ ] Reduced-motion collapses all four to instant via the token layer alone.
- [ ] Zero motion state in documents/previews/persistence (JSON-first guardrail).
- [ ] Visual verification on `examples/dashboard/dock` (browser gate — human or browser-capable peer per the design-artifact render rule).
- [ ] Cross-family review before merge.

## Out of Scope

- FLIP structural-commit animation (#14929, sibling consumer).
- The e2e assertions themselves (#14591-successor).
- Visual language / flagship polish of the affordances (#14930's design artifact owns treatments; this leaf is motion mechanics on existing visuals).

## Related
